heroHeadline: A Yard You'll Be Proud Of
heroSubheadline: Full-service lawn care and landscaping that keeps your property looking its best all year.
aboutSection:
Evergreen Lawn & Landscape has been shaping beautiful Nashville yards for over a decade. We treat every property like it's our own.

Our crews are punctual, tidy, and detail-obsessed — from a weekly mow to a full landscape redesign, we sweat the small stuff so you don't have to.

We're fully licensed and insured, and we back every service with a satisfaction guarantee.

services.name: Lawn Maintenance
services.description: Reliable mowing, edging, and trimming on a schedule that suits you.

services.name: Landscape Design
services.description: Custom plantings and hardscapes that elevate your curb appeal.

services.name: Fertilization & Weed Control
services.description: Season-long programs for a thick, healthy, green lawn.

services.name: Mulch & Bed Care
services.description: Fresh mulch, clean edges, and healthy planting beds.

services.name: Leaf & Seasonal Cleanup
services.description: Spring and fall cleanups that keep your yard pristine.

testimonials.text: Our lawn has never looked better. The crew is reliable and thorough.
testimonials.author: Karen W.

testimonials.text: They redesigned our whole front yard and the neighbors keep asking who did it.
testimonials.author: Tom H.

testimonials.text: Always on time, always tidy. Worth every penny.
testimonials.author: Nadia B.

metaTitle: Evergreen Lawn & Landscape — Landscaping in Nashville, TN
metaDescription: Full-service lawn care and landscaping in Nashville, TN. Licensed, insured, and satisfaction guaranteed. Call for a free estimate.
